PublicRemarks: Welcome to 400 West 3rd Street, a spacious townhouse located in the Quaker Hill district of Wilmington, offering four bedrooms and two and a half baths in a highly walkable setting close to the central business district. Set on a great block with wide sidewalks and ample parking, the home also features a brick exterior and a front wood deck—ideal for enjoying time outdoors. Inside, the home opens to a bright and generously sized living room with attractive wood-look laminate flooring and abundant natural light from both front and side windows. The home features newer insulated double-pane windows throughout. From the living room, you can access the dining room and the upper levels. The dining room continues the laminate flooring and offers excellent natural light, along with a glass-front corner cabinet, access to the basement, and a conveniently located half bath with tile flooring, updated vanity, and dual-flush toilet. The kitchen includes tile flooring, recessed lighting, and an abundance of cabinet and counter space. Features include a dishwasher, dual stainless sink with pullout sprayer, four-burner Whirlpool gas stove with range hood, and a refrigerator with top freezer. Two windows provide natural light. Just beyond the kitchen is a first-floor laundry room with tile flooring, washer/dryer setup, and access to the backyard. The second level offers three well-sized bedrooms, all with laminate flooring. The front bedroom features a bow bay window, ceiling fan with lighting, and a double closet. A shared full bath includes a tiled tub surround, tile flooring, and a large vanity. Additional bedrooms offer good natural light and closet space. The third level features a fourth bedroom with three windows, a large closet, and its own private full bath with a neo-angle shower, updated vanity, tile flooring, and dual-flush toilet. The basement provides additional storage space and houses the electrical panel with circuit breakers. The space appears dry and functional. This home offers a flexible layout and generous living space in a convenient city location, ideal for those seeking proximity to Wilmington’s business district and local amenities.

PublicRemarks: Unique Rental Opportunity - Unique path to home ownership. -PLEASE READ CAREFULLY! Is home ownership a goal you have someday?  Still renting because the traditional paths of building credit and a downpayment seem further away?  Read on .. This home offers a flexible path to homeownership for a buyer who wants to move in now and buy later. The process allows you to secure a home now and focus on securing optimal traditional financing. Get the home now, enjoy it now, and work toward purchase over time. It can be an excellent fit for someone who needs time to improve credit, build savings, strengthen income, or otherwise position themselves for long-term mortgage success. It may also help protect you if home values rise during the option period. Flexible terms may be tailored to the buyer’s situation, including the down payment and monthly payment structure, creating a more realistic and personalized path forward than a one-size-fits-all conventional purchase. For the right buyer, this can be a lower-barrier path into ownership. Instead of renting with no equity you may be able to apply your upfront down payment toward the future purchase. It's great for a financially capable person who needs a little more runway. For buyers who believe in their future trajectory and want to secure a home now rather than wait and hope conditions become easier later, this can be a very compelling opportunity. The arrangement gives clarity and a path toward ownership with stability and clear steps to take. Don’t miss your chance to own this beautifully updated 3-bedroom, 2 full bathroom semi-detached brick home located in the heart of Wilmington’s sought-after Little Italy neighborhood. Step onto the inviting covered front porch and into a bright, sunlit living space featuring luxury vinyl plank flooring, overhead fan and an open, flowing layout that seamlessly connects the living and dining areas, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The recently renovated kitchen is thoughtfully designed with granite countertops, ceramic tile flooring, stainless steel appliances including a gas GE range with built-in microwave and LG double-door refrigerator, and ample cabinetry for storage. Large windows fill the space with natural light, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Just beyond the kitchen, you’ll find a convenient first-floor full bathroom with a stall shower, along with direct access to the fully fenced backyard with alley access, offering both privacy and functionality. Upstairs, the second level features three well-sized bedrooms, each complete with ceiling fans and generous closet space. The updated full bathroom showcases tile finishes and modern fixtures, providing a clean and refreshed feel. The primary bedroom is especially inviting, with multiple windows allowing for abundant natural light. The unfinished basement provides excellent storage space and includes major system upgrades for peace of mind, including a new Lennox gas furnace with smart heating and cooling technology (2024) and a gas hot water heater (2023). Ideally situated just steps from William “Judy” Johnson Memorial Park and within close proximity to Wilmington’s Riverfront, DelTech, shopping, dining, and major roadways including I-95 and I-295, this home offers both convenience and lifestyle. WHO QUALIFIES - this is the right opportunity for someone who believes in themselves and their ability to follow a plan. The arrangement gives you time and a clear path to fix your credit without expensive services and to build up enough down payment to become a homeowner. It's an opportunity for someone willing to build some "sweat equity" as needed by caring for the home like a home owner would.   Some portion of your monthly rent and/or deposit may be applied to your closing costs.  Interested? Schedule a tour!

PublicRemarks:
Magazine-worthy Trolley Square rental loaded with charm, character, and thoughtful updates throughout. This beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath home blends historic details with modern conveniences, featuring stunning hardwood floors, exposed brick accents, recessed lighting, and abundant natural light across all levels.

Located in the heart of Trolley Square, just steps from restaurants, bars, parks, pickleball courts, basketball courts, tennis courts, and walking trails. Convenient to I-95, downtown Wilmington, and major hospitals. A rare opportunity to rent a truly special home in one of Wilmington’s most desirable neighborhoods.

Notable highlights include exposed brick throughout the home, recessed and track lighting, beautiful hardwood floors on both levels, built-ins, and numerous thoughtful updates that make this home truly special.

The main level offers a warm and inviting living room with fireplace and beautiful hardwood flooring that flows seamlessly into the dining room. The dining area provides direct access to the private rear patio, creating an ideal setup for everyday living and entertaining. The updated kitchen features beautiful countertops, gas range, stainless steel appliances, brand new refrigerator, exposed brick accents, and excellent cabinet storage, all enhanced by stylish lighting and thoughtful design.

The second level includes two bedrooms, a full bathroom, and a bright den/flex space. The skylit den features custom built-ins and works perfectly as a home office, reading nook, or play area. The full bathroom showcases classic subway tile with a modern accent band and updated fixtures. The primary bedroom includes washer and dryer conveniently located within the room and access to a private balcony overlooking the backyard. The second bedroom offers great natural light and additional storage.

Enjoy the private fenced backyard patio, ideal for relaxing or entertaining. The leaves currently in the patio area will be removed prior to tenant move-in.

Please note: the home features a narrow staircase typical of historic Trolley Square properties. Tenants should plan accordingly when moving large furniture pieces or mattresses.

SHOWINGS: Due to the paperwork required for private showings—and the high volume of inquiries rental listings receive—the landlord’s agent is unable to provide individual tours. Interested parties must either (1) arrange a showing through their own agent or (2) attend a public open house. Open house dates will be published online several days in advance.

RENTAL REQUIREMENTS & OTHER INFO:

(1) Application Details: Agents can view full instructions—please ask one to share them with you.

(2) Income Requirement: Household gross monthly income must be at least 2.5x the monthly rent.

(3) Credit Requirement: Each adult applicant must have a minimum TransUnion ResidentScore of 660, pulled via RentSpree. Note: this is not a FICO score—it's a rental-specific model by TransUnion (range: 350–850) and uses a soft pull that will not affect your credit score.

(4) Exceptions: The application will outline any possible exceptions to the income and credit requirements.

(5) Vouchers: This property does NOT accept Section 8 or any housing vouchers.

(6) For Rent Only: The home is not for sale, and rent-to-own is not an option.

(7) Pets: Considered case-by-case at the landlord’s sole discretion. If approved, a nonrefundable monthly pet rent per pet will apply, and possibly a refund-eligible pet security deposit per pet.

(8) Service/Support Animals: Not classified as pets. Must provide current, verifiable documentation.

(9) Lease Term: Lease terms shorter or longer than 12 months may be considered; however, the landlord prefers an initial 12-month term. Rent may vary for lease terms other than 12 months.

(10) Accuracy: All listing info is believed accurate, but applicants/tenants are responsible for verifying all details.
